title: Pong
description: Makes a ping sound when you're name is in chat! :3
body:
## Moved to [Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-oneconfig)

## Pong
Makes a ping sound when you're name is in chat! :3

## Future Features
I'd like to add the following features in later releases, follow to get notified when I do. :3
- Sound customization (sound, volume, pitch)
- Highlight name (customizable color)
- Keywords (ping for other keywords in chat)
